auth.signInSubtitle: Use your admin or user account to manage monitors.
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many sign-in attempts. Try again in 15 minutes.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.registerSubtitle: Register to manage your own uptime monitors.
auth.createAdminSubtitle: First run - create the initial administrator to manage uptime monitors.
auth.usernameSigninHint: You can sign in with email or username

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account details and security settings.
account.profileSubtitle: Update your username and language. Email cannot be changed.
account.securitySubtitle: Change your password. You'll stay signed in after changing it.
account.usernameHelp: 2+ characters. Used to sign in instead of email.

errors.USERNAME_INVALID: Username must be at least 2 characters and only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.NEW_PASSWORD_SAME_AS_CURRENT: New password must be different from your current password
errors.SETUP_REQUIRED: Create the admin account first via the setup page.
errors.RATE_LIMITED_SETUP: Too many setup attempts. Try again later.
errors.RATE_LIMITED_REGISTER: Too many registration attempts. Try again later.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.addFirstMonitor: Add your first monitor to get started.
dashboard.noMonitorsYet: No monitors yet. Add one above to get started.

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.subtitle: Up to 50 status changes in the last 7 days, {pageSize} per page.
activity.empty: No activity in the last 7 days.

monitorsPage.title: Monitors
monitorsPage.deleteBulkMessage: Delete {count} monitors ({preview})? This cannot be undone.
monitorsPage.importJsonArray: File must contain a JSON array of monitors.
monitorsPage.importParseError: Could not parse file as JSON.
monitorsPage.selectAllAria: Select all monitors in this list
monitorsPage.noMonitorsYetShort: No monitors yet. Add one above.
monitorsPage.importConfirm: Import {count, plural, one {# monitor} other {# monitors}}
monitorsPage.importSuccess: Successfully imported {count, plural, one {# monitor} other {# monitors}}.
monitorsPage.importReady: Ready to import {count, plural, one {# monitor} other {# monitors}}:
monitorsPage.bulkEditTitle: Edit {count, plural, one {# monitor} other {# monitors}}
monitorsPage.deleteSuccessBulk: {count, plural, one {# monitor deleted} other {# monitors deleted}}
monitorsPage.deletePartialFailed: {count, plural, one {# monitor could not be deleted} other {# monitors could not be deleted}}
monitorsPage.pausePartialFailed: {count, plural, one {# monitor could not be paused} other {# monitors could not be paused}}
monitorsPage.resumePartialFailed: {count, plural, one {# monitor could not be resumed} other {# monitors could not be resumed}}
